establishmentHub.notFound: Place not found or you don't have permission.
establishmentHub.staffHint: You're part of this team as a collaborator. To leave the team, use the button below.
establishmentHub.readOnlyHint: Only the owner or manager can manage collaborators and services. Use Registration details to view address, hours and category.
establishmentHub.inactiveManagerHint: Only the owner can reactivate this place in public search.
establishmentHub.leaveMessage: You'll stop being part of this team. This action can't be undone.

register.suggestCategorySubject: Suggestion for a new category (establishment registration)
register.suggestCategoryBody: I couldn't find my business category in the app. Describe the field and type of service:
register.permissionPhotosMessage: We need access to your photos to upload images of the place.
register.loginRequiredMessage: You must be logged in with a complete profile.
register.cnpjInvalidMessage: Check the digits or leave the field blank.
register.phoneInvalidMessage: Enter the mobile number with area code (11 digits, starting with 9 after the area code).
register.photosRangeMessage: Add between 1 and 5 photos of the establishment before confirming.
register.gateMessage: Log in and complete your profile afterwards to register a place.
register.suggestCategoryLink: Didn't find it? Suggest a new category

placeForm.reviewIntroCreate: Check the details below. Tap Back to edit. When you confirm, the place is registered and you continue in the partner area.
placeForm.reviewIntroEdit: Check the details below. Tap Back to edit.
placeForm.hoursPlaceholder: Tap to set days and hours
placeForm.galleryHintReadOnly: Images that appear on the establishment profile.
placeForm.galleryHintEditable: Add between 1 and 5 photos of the space (environment, equipment or work).
placeForm.cityAlertMessage: The postal code is from {{location}}/{{uf}}. Choose the matching city in the list.

edit.permissionDeniedMessage: Only the owner or manager can edit this place's details.
edit.inactiveBanner: This place is deactivated: it doesn't appear in public search. Reactivate below to show it again.
edit.legacyGalleryBanner: These photos come from an old version: remove them with × and upload again (1 to 5) so you can save.
edit.keywordsHint: Optional keywords that help customers find this place in search, beyond its name.
edit.photosKeepRangeMessage: Keep between 1 and 5 photos of the establishment. Upload the missing ones again.
edit.photosUnlinkedMessage: Some image isn't associated with the server yet. Remove it and add it again.
edit.savedMessage: The establishment details have been updated.
edit.suggestCategorySubject: Suggestion for a new category (establishment editing)
edit.reactivateConfirmMessage: The place will appear again in public search for new customers.
edit.deactivateConfirmMessage: The place will stop appearing in public search. Existing bookings aren't deleted; you can reactivate whenever you want.
edit.reactivatedMessage: Customers can find this establishment again.
edit.deactivatedMessage: The establishment was archived in the deactivated list.

services.notFound: Place not found or you don't have permission.
services.permissionDenied: Only the owner or manager can manage services at {{name}}.
services.emptyList: No services registered. Tap "New service" to create one.
services.listHint: Services offered at this place. Edit price, duration and who can perform each one.

serviceForm.permissionDenied: Only the owner or manager can change services at {{name}}.
serviceForm.keywordsHint: Help customers find this service in search, beyond its name.
serviceForm.performersHint: If no one is marked individually, all collaborators at the place will be able to perform it.
serviceForm.noProfessionalsHint: Register collaborators in management to choose who performs this service.
serviceForm.deleteConfirmMessage: The service will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
serviceForm.durationInvalid: Enter the duration in minutes only (between 1 and 1440).
serviceForm.noProfessionalsError: Register at least one collaborator at the place before saving the service.
serviceForm.selectPerformerError: Select at least one collaborator or check "All perform".

home.gateSubtitle: Sign in to manage your places from here.
home.gateIncompleteProfile: Complete your profile to unlock place management.
home.noOwnedEstablishments: You don't have any establishment where you are owner or manager.

cep.lookupFailed: Could not look up the ZIP code.
cep.networkError: Network failure while fetching the ZIP code. Try again.
